prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Lambda II 3.3L V6 (G6DH)** with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger** (1.05 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on E85, paired with a **Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU** and **Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors** for 600+ WHP on a **Kia K8-specific custom tubular manifold** by HKS.

Full **Kia K8 Limousine chassis reinforcement** with a **Cusco bolt-in 8-point roll cage** (K8-specific design) and **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 80-90100K)** for subframe and control arms, combined with a **KW Clubsport 3-way coilover kit (K8-specific valving)** and **H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear sway bars** to mitigate body roll in high-speed cornering.

Drivetrain overhaul with a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (K8-specific 3.52 final drive ratio)** in a **PPG sequential gearset (dog-ring, 5-speed)** mated to a **Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch (7.25" diameter, K8-specific flywheel)** and a **Quaife ATB differential** for the rear, paired with **Motul Gear 300 75W-90** for extreme heat resistance.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (K8 Limousine-specific, 50mm front / 70mm rear fender flares)** with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** by Seibon, paired with a **Vortex Generators front lip** and **custom rear diffuser** by APR Performance (K8-specific CFD-optimized design).

**Full custom livery by Driftworks** featuring a **matte Hyper Black base (3M 1080 wrap)** with **electric blue (PPG Global BC/CC) ghost flames** and **OEM+ Kia badging (debadged front grille, custom LED-illuminated rear K8 emblem)**.

**BBS LM-R 19x10.5 ET20 (front) / 19x12 ET35 (rear) wheels** with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (275/30/19 front, 315/30/19 rear)**, paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm front rotors, K8-specific brackets)** and **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** for aggressive track use.
